description_long: This is a metallic can with a bright orange and blue color scheme, labeled prominently as 'Diet Soda' with '0 Calories!' and '100% unsweetened' in bold, eye-catching fonts. The can features a standard cylindrical shape with a slightly tapered top and a silver pull-tab lid. The front of the can displays the product name and key selling points, while the sides include additional information such as ingredients, a barcode, and a nutritional facts panel. The surface is glossy and reflective, typical of aluminum beverage cans. The can is designed to be easily held in one hand and is commonly found in urban environments like vending machines, convenience stores, and recycling bins.
description: A glossy orange and blue aluminum can labeled 'Diet Soda' with bold text and a silver pull-tab lid. The can features detailed product and nutritional information on its sides.
description_view_0: The front view shows the 'Diet Soda' label, '0 Calories!', and '100% unsweetened' text in large, bold fonts with a burst graphic.
description_view_1: This angled side view reveals the edge of the main label and highlights the '0 CALORIES PER SERVING' text and part of the nutritional panel.
description_view_2: The back view displays the full nutritional facts panel, barcode, and additional product information on the orange background.
description_view_3: This side view shows the ingredients list and a 'Please Recycle' message, with the edge of the main label partially visible.
